subcodes.first_line: O Khalil! Thou wilt never know what befell the Friend of the All-Merciful at the hands of the manifestations of Satan. Say: Verily, Nimrod [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا خلیل انک لن تعرف ما ورد علی خلیل الرحمن من مظاهر الشیطان قل ان النمرود
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @martyrs and martyrdom
